name: AWS CodeBuild
description: Managed CI build runner on AWS — pay per build-minute (~$0.005/min for general1.small). Each build spins up a container, runs a buildspec.yml against source from S3 / GitHub / CodeCommit, uploads artifacts to S3, streams logs to CloudWatch, then tears down. SigV4-signed JSON-RPC API; every call POSTs to the regional endpoint with `X-Amz-Target: CodeBuild_20161006.<Operation>`.

credential_fields.name: access_key_id
credential_fields.label: AWS Access Key ID
credential_fields.description: IAM access key with codebuild:* and (for cross-service flow) s3:Get/PutObject + logs:GetLogEvents on the build log group

credential_fields.name: region
credential_fields.label: AWS Region
credential_fields.description: Region where the CodeBuild project lives (us-east-1, eu-west-1, …)

credential_fields.name: session_token
credential_fields.label: AWS Session Token
credential_fields.description: Required only with temporary STS credentials.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List CodeBuild project names in the region.

tools.name: batch_get_projects
tools.description: Get full project definitions by name. Args: names (array).

tools.name: start_build
tools.description: Start a build for a project. Returns build_id you poll with batch_get_builds. Args: projectName, sourceLocationOverride? (e.g. s3://bucket/key.zip), buildspecOverride?, environmentVariablesOverride?, computeTypeOverride?, idempotencyToken?.

tools.name: batch_get_builds
tools.description: Get build status/details by id. Poll this to track progress. Args: ids (array of build IDs).

tools.name: list_builds_for_project
tools.description: List recent build IDs for a project. Args: projectName, sortOrder? (ASCENDING|DESCENDING), nextToken?.

tools.name: stop_build
tools.description: Cancel a running build. Args: id.

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Create a CodeBuild project. Args: name, source ({type: S3|GITHUB|CODECOMMIT|..., location}), artifacts ({type: S3|NO_ARTIFACTS, location?}), environment ({type, image, computeType, environmentVariables?}), serviceRole (IAM role ARN).

tools.name: delete_project
tools.description: Delete a CodeBuild project (build history retained). Args: name.
